diffs.diff:
--- a/test.py
+++ b/test.py
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+import os, json, torch

+os.environ['TRANSFORMERS_OFFLINE'] = '1'

+from transformers import SegformerForSemanticSegmentation

+print('Loading model...')

+model = SegformerForSemanticSegmentation.from_pretrained('nvidia/mit-b5', num_labels=150, ignore_mismatched_sizes=True)

+print('Model loaded.')

+params = sum(p.numel() for p in model.parameters())

+print(f'Parameters: {params:,}')

+print('Testing dataset...')

+from dataset import ADE20KDataset

+data_dir = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')

+ds = ADE20KDataset(data_dir, split='training', crop_size=512, random_crop=True, flip=True)

+print(f'Dataset length: {len(ds)}')

+img, label = ds[0]

+print(f'Image shape: {img.shape}, label shape: {label.shape}')

+print('Unique labels in sample:', torch.unique(label))

+model.eval()

+with torch.no_grad():

+    out = model(pixel_values=img.unsqueeze(0))

+    print(f'Output logits shape: {out.logits.shape}')

+print('All tests passed.')
